expected_trades_per_day_basis: Synthesizer flagged ~60 triggers in the data window; assuming the standard 30-day window that's ~2.0/day, but the funding-neutral + taker-buy + high-liquidity gates can compress this to ~1/day in trending regimes.

best_in: funding rate hovering in [-0.01%, +0.01%] (neutral perpetual carry)
BTC realized vol in mid-band (30-60% annualized)
high-liquidity majors (BTC/ETH/SOL/BNB and top-10 alts) when taker-buy ratio is genuinely elevated, not just spoofed
worst_in: strongly negative funding regimes (crowded short squeezes already priced in — this filter excludes them by design, so coverage drops to zero)
extreme funding extremes (>+0.05% or <-0.05%) where the funding-neutral gate kills all entries
low-liquidity / micro-cap symbols where taker_buy_ratio_5m is noisy and easily manipulated
regime_sensitivity.explanation: The funding-neutral gate is the defining feature: it deliberately excludes the asymmetric-payoff regime that produced the E126 paper-trading -13.5% trap, but it also means coverage collapses whenever the market enters a strong directional funding regime. Expect long flat stretches punctuated by clusters of trades when funding mean-reverts through zero.

live_readiness_caveats: Three-channel alignment requirement means signals are SPARSE — expect 0-trade days for 30-50% of the paper window; do not panic-tune after a quiet week.

Funding rate is sampled at 8h Binance epochs but archetype reads it as a continuous gate — verify the loop uses the most-recent funding snapshot at signal time, not the next epoch's value (look-ahead risk).

taker_buy_ratio_5m=0.60 threshold on high-liquidity symbols is common during normal up-drift; the edge depends on the JOINT condition with three-channel alignment, so single-condition slippage analysis will mislead.

monitoring_metrics.rationale: Synthesizer estimated ~2/day; sustained drift outside this band means either the funding-neutral regime has vanished (under) or a filter degraded and is letting through non-aligned signals (over).
This is the defining gate. Any leakage means the entry filter is broken and the archetype is silently mutating into a generic long, reintroducing the E126 trap risk.
Cross-channel alignment is fragile to timestamp drift across the three Telegram channels; significant median shrinkage suggests channel-clock misalignment is causing late entries.
With ~60 total triggers, a 5-loss streak is ~8% of sample — unusual for a funding-neutral edge and would invalidate the 'low trap risk' synthesizer claim.
Filter explicitly requires liquidity_bucket=high, so fills should be near-perfect; anything lower means the liquidity classifier is stale.

stop_trading_triggers.rationale: With only ~60 expected triggers per 30 days, 10 trades is a meaningful sample; sustained negative Sharpe means the funding-neutral premise (mean-reversion edge in the neutral-carry regime) has broken.

stop_trading_triggers.condition: Two consecutive funding-rate-anomaly entries (|funding|>0.0001 at entry time)
stop_trading_triggers.rationale: Indicates the gate has failed at the data layer — strategy is no longer the archetype the user approved and must halt before it morphs into an unguarded long.

stop_trading_triggers.condition: Live cumulative return < -3% on $1000 paper account (i.e. -$30) within first 30 trades
stop_trading_triggers.rationale: E126 trap precedent: paper compounded to -13.5% from a 'positive' backtest; killing at -3% caps damage well before that scenario can repeat, given the explicit low-trap-risk claim.

expected_max_dd_basis: Funding-neutral gate excludes the asymmetric-TP/SL regime that drove E126's -13.5% paper DD; with sparse trades (~60) and high-liquidity-only execution, expected worst-case cluster of 3-4 consecutive losses at 5-10% sizing implies ~3-5% account DD.
compare_to_existing: Closest analogue is E051 pc_high_liquidity_long (best=+0.347, trig=2157) — same liquidity gate and long bias, but E051 lacks the funding-neutral and three-channel alignment filters. Expect this archetype to be a much-lower-frequency, lower-DD cousin of E051; if their daily PnL correlation in paper-shadow is >0.7, the funding+cross-channel filters are not adding orthogonal edge and the archetype should be deprecated in favor of E051.
